mapper.sql: c.`id`, c.`name`, c.`address`, c.`country`, c.`province`, c.`city`, c.`contact_phone`, c.`latitude`, c.`longitude`, c.`surface_type`, c.`indoor_outdoor`, c.`has_indoor`, c.`has_outdoor`, c.`total_court_count`, c.`opening_time`, c.`closing_time`, c.`venue_status`, c.`approval_status`, c.`wechat_mini_program_name`, c.`photo_urls`, c.`description`, c.`created_by`, c.`reviewed_by`, c.`reviewed_at`, c.`rejected_reason`, u.`email` AS submitter_email, u.`display_name` AS submitter_name, u.`phone` AS submitter_phone
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM `ir_profile`.`courts` c LEFT JOIN `ir_auth`.`users` u ON u.`id` = c.`created_by` WHERE c.`id` = #{courtId} AND c.`status` = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM `ir_profile`.`court_change_requests` WHERE `court_id` = #{courtId} AND `request_status` = 'pending' AND `status` = 0 ORDER BY `created_at` DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `ir_profile`.`courts` c JOIN `ir_profile`.`court_change_requests` r ON r.`court_id` = c.`id` AND r.`id` = #{requestId} AND r.`request_status` = 'pending' AND r.`status` = 0 SET c.`country` = r.`country`, c.`province` = r.`province`, c.`city` = r.`city`, c.`name` = r.`name`, c.`address` = r.`address`, c.`contact_phone` = r.`contact_phone`, c.`wechat_mini_program_name` = r.`wechat_mini_program_name`, c.`photo_urls` = r.`photo_urls`, c.`description` = r.`description`, c.`latitude` = r.`latitude`, c.`longitude` = r.`longitude`, c.`surface_type` = r.`surface_type`, c.`indoor_outdoor` = r.`indoor_outdoor`, c.`has_indoor` = r.`has_indoor`, c.`has_outdoor` = r.`has_outdoor`, c.`total_court_count` = r.`total_court_count`, c.`opening_time` = r.`opening_time`, c.`closing_time` = r.`closing_time`, c.`approval_status` = 'approved', c.`venue_status` = 'active' WHERE c.`status` = 0

UPDATE `ir_profile`.`court_change_requests` SET `request_status` = #{requestStatus}, `reviewed_by` = #{reviewedBy}, `reviewed_at` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `rejected_reason` = #{reason} WHERE `id` = #{requestId} AND `request_status` = 'pending' AND `status` = 0

UPDATE `ir_profile`.`courts` SET `status` = -1, `approval_status` = 'voided', `venue_status` = 'inactive', `reviewed_by` = #{reviewedBy}, `reviewed_at` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `rejected_reason` = #{reason} WHERE `id` = #{courtId} AND `approval_status` = 'pending' AND `status` = 0

UPDATE `ir_profile`.`court_change_requests` SET `status` = -1, `request_status` = 'voided', `reviewed_by` = #{reviewedBy}, `reviewed_at` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `rejected_reason` = #{reason} WHERE `id` = #{requestId} AND `request_status` = 'pending' AND `status` = 0
